docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100027198) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKSAYAN, BURAK SERVED NOV-22-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-26-2017 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKSAYAN, BURAK AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $10,194.65 AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $108.56 INTEREST, $1,621.99 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100028947) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKSAYAN, BURAK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKSAYAN, BURAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO INC $8,382.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.43 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,620.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
